rag_rules: Place assume/guarantee clauses in component type annexes when they describe interface behavior, not implementation details
Use exact visible identifiers from the current component scope; do not invent or copy names from examples
generic_rules: AGREE contracts must be scoped to the owning component and use only visible symbols
Component type contracts should contain assumptions and guarantees for ports and data types
Implementation-level bindings like assignments go in implementation annexes
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE annex blocks are enclosed in `annex agree {** ... **};`
Assumptions use `assume "label": expression;` and guarantees use `guarantee "label": expression;`
anti_patterns: Do not reference implementation-only subcomponent paths from component type scopes
Do not encode AADL timing properties as AGREE expressions unless model exposes explicit typed ports or constants
irrelevant_topics: AADL property names as AGREE variables
